falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above 120% of the previous peak in the bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the pattern similarity claim, as the price action would diverge from the historical bottom pattern, disproving the UNKNOWN phase assumption.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to >50% above the 200-day average for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would indicate strong market participation, falsifying the HOLD signal by confirming a clear directional move (either bullish or bearish) rather than an unknown phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
